news.headline: Pope Leo had to catch a ride from the king of Spain after plane’s engine failed
news.summary: The pope wrapped up a trip to Spain by borrowing a private jet from King Filipe VI after the Vatican's chartered plane, with the press corps on board, broke down.

news.headline: King leads tributes to 'giant of the art world' David Hockney
